data.raceName: THE CHAD E. CARLTON TROTTING FINAL MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. AUGUST SALAZAR scored a dominant win off the inside draw when resuming at this course and distance last start. Tactics will be crucial from this wide draw. Must raise the bar but he has the ability to test this field. 9. INVERNESS AVE form this prep has been impossible to fault and he made it two from two when successful at his latest appearance over 1609m at this track, getting home by 9 metres. Interesting to see what unfolds from this wide draw. This looks a sterner test than last time but on his best form he is good enough to take this out. 5. MADAM PRESIDENT is the next best after finishing runner-up over 1609m at this track last time out. 6. MAGA HILL is in the mix following a respectable second at his first run back over 1609m at this track.","runners":[7,9,5,6],"exclusive":false}
